title: nisa vatkeana
side_effects: Nisa vatkeana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing dizziness, nausea, and headaches due to its high concentration of alkaloids. In some cases, overconsumption of the plant's extracts can lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling of the face, lips, and tongue. If not prepared correctly, Nisa vatkeana can also interact with other medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and diabetes. Additionally, improper use of the plant can cause gastrointestinal issues, including stomach pain, diarrhea, and vomiting.
